title: Toalagar

'''Toalagar''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and sent to the penal colony at [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] along with friend and fellow pilot [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Samuel Raider]]. Toalagar, Raider, and other captured [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] managed to escape and stowed away on the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Genue]]'', bound for [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Subsequently, the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Rebel rescue shuttle]] ''[[Drago]]'' and a pair of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter]]s,<ref name="A/R-22">Although both the game [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] and the [[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide|official strategy guide]] referred to the ship as an A-wing, the time period of the game's events would make it the R-22 Spearhead, the A-wing's predecessor.</ref> flown by Captain [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Cardacs]], [[Rescue from Stars' End|successfully rescued]] them before they could be recaptured by Imperial forces.<ref name="XWOSG" />

The escapees had been hearing rumors for months of a new Imperial [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|weapon]] but had been unable to get close to anybody who knew more. However, they were able to learn that [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slaves were being sent to work on the project. Toalagar's fellow escapee, Sam Raider, informed the Alliance about the Wookiees and was chosen to lead Red Squadron on a [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|rescue mission]]. Raider chose Farlander and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]] as his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmates]] but replaced Jan-lo with Toalagar after his friend asked to take part, complaining of a lack of action.<ref name="XWOSG" />

The three Rebel pilots flew R-22 Spearheads against [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], defending the [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighter]] [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']] while the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] of [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]<ref name="XW">[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]</ref> disabled the freighter ahead of a boarding operation. Although the mission was a success, Toalagar's R-22 was destroyed by a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launched by one of the Assault Gunboats during the first pass and the pilot was killed, a [[Death/Legends|death]] which Toalagar's friend Raider blamed on himself.<ref name="XWOSG" />
